name: gitlab
description: GitLab repository workflows for Codex backed by the glab CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Clone, pull, and push GitLab repos with glab-aware workflows
interface.longDescription: Bring GitLab repository workflows into Codex through a CLI-first plugin that validates local glab auth, uses glab for repo discovery and cloning, and uses git for pull and push operations.
defaultPrompt: Clone a GitLab repo with glab
Pull the latest changes from this GitLab branch
Push my current branch to GitLab
